text.title: Trivy Pinned Supply-Chain Scan Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping repo surface + compliance need + egress to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf is a conclusion ref bound to a rule id.

conclusion.verdict: skip — air-gapped without offline DB mirror
wire Trivy + SBOM emission + gh release attach
wire Trivy fs + image; SBOM optional but recommended

example.trace: surface_present=true → db_access=true → compliance_required=true → sbom-per-release → trivy.yml + release-sbom.sh

text.example: Canonical traversal from root question through branches to a single conclusion.
